_comment: @stage-labs/config — shared TypeScript options for the React Native app (apps/app), layered ON TOP of expo/tsconfig.base. The consumer extends BOTH (array extends, this one last so it wins): ["expo/tsconfig.base", "@stage-labs/config/tsconfig/react-native.json"]. Package-specific `paths`/`include` stay in the consumer. The full strict family + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + noImplicitOverride match the base so strictness is uniform with the pure-TS packages.
